description: Hand a human a rich interactive UI by URL and get structured data back, from any MCP client.
name: io.github.aerolalit/pane

environmentVariables.description: Pane agent API key. If unset, the server auto-registers a fresh agent against the relay on first use and saves the key to the shared CLI store (~/.config/pane/config.json).
environmentVariables.name: PANE_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Pane relay base URL. Defaults to the hosted relay https://relay.paneui.com; set this to point at a self-hosted relay.
environmentVariables.name: PANE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Display name for the auto-registered agent on the relay.
environmentVariables.name: PANE_AGENT_NAME

environmentVariables.description: Registration secret, required only for relays running REGISTRATION_MODE=secret.
environmentVariables.name: PANE_REGISTER_SECRET

title: Pane
